'''Lish V''', also known as '''L-5''', was a tectonically active, inhabited [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lish]] in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]. Of Lish's fifteen moons, L-5 was the only one with a breathable atmosphere.

Lish V was taken over by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]], the last of ten moons in the system on which mining facilities were established by the company. The moon suffered many earthquakes due to its close proximity to the moons [[Lish IV]] and [[Lish VI]], which created tidal pulls on L-5. To ensure the safety of its workers, the Lant Corporation populated the moon with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped cities, such as the capital, [[Gadde]].
